summary: Completed frontend testing of mobile responsive features for HevaPOS. All 8 tests PASSED: (1) Mobile sidebar shows all 10 menu items + logout button, (2) Mobile dashboard heading visible below header, (3) Mobile orders page heading and status filter tabs visible, (4) Desktop reprint receipt buttons visible and clickable, (5) Tablet portrait shows mobile header at 767px, (6) Desktop orders shows sidebar + reprint buttons, (7) POS has no Connect Printer button, (8) Staff mobile POS fits viewport.

issues: At exactly 768px width, desktop sidebar shows instead of mobile header. This is expected Tailwind md: breakpoint behavior (>=768px). At 767px, mobile header correctly shows.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile responsive features verified working. Mobile sidebar (375x812) shows all 10 menu items (Dashboard, Tables, Categories, Products, POS, Orders, Reports, Cash Drawer, Printers, Settings) plus Logout button at bottom. Dashboard heading 'Today's Dashboard' visible at y=72 (below h-14 mobile header). Orders page shows 'Order History' heading and all 4 status filter tabs (All, Pending, Completed, Cancelled). Desktop (1920x800) shows 94 reprint buttons with 'Reprint' text visible. POS screen has no 'Connect Printer' button. Staff mobile POS fits viewport with header, search, categories, products grid, and cart section all visible.

test_1_mobile_sidebar_375x812.details: All 10 menu items visible: Dashboard, Tables, Categories, Products, POS, Orders, Reports, Cash Drawer, Printers, Settings. Logout button visible at bottom of sheet.

test_2_mobile_dashboard_heading_375x812.details: Dashboard heading 'Today's Dashboard' visible at y=72, below mobile header (h-14 = 56px). Not hidden behind header.

test_3_mobile_orders_heading_375x812.details: Order History heading visible. Status filter tabs (All, Pending, Completed, Cancelled) all visible and functional.

test_4_desktop_reprint_receipt_1920x800.details: Found 94 reprint buttons with data-testid='reprint-receipt-{id}'. 'Reprint' text visible on desktop. Button clickable (triggers download attempt).

test_5_tablet_portrait_768x1024.details: At 768px, desktop sidebar shows (expected Tailwind md: breakpoint). At 767px, mobile header with hamburger menu shows correctly. Cards in 2-column layout.

test_6_desktop_orders_1920x800.details: Sidebar visible on left. Reprint button text visible next to each order's total amount.

test_7_pos_no_printer_1920x800.details: No 'Connect Printer' button found on POS screen. No 'Connect Printer' text in page content.

test_8_staff_pos_mobile_375x812.details: Staff user 'user' redirected to /pos. Header visible at y=0. Search bar visible. 5 category buttons visible and scrollable. 11 product cards in 2-column grid. Cart section at y=487 with height=325, fits within 812px viewport.
